vocab.meaning: tác phẩm sắp đặt đa phương tiện
vocab.example: The highlight of my visit was a captivating multimedia installation that combined digital projections with surround sound.

vocab.meaning: kiệt tác ngoạn mục (đẹp đến nín thở)
vocab.example: Coming face-to-face with such a breathtaking masterpiece in the original oil was a truly humbling experience.

vocab.meaning: thứ tự thời gian (trình tự lịch sử)
vocab.example: I appreciated how the gallery was laid out in chronological order, allowing me to see the artist’s style evolve.
The use of soft pastel colors in the landscape wing helped evoke a sense of serenity and nostalgia.
The temporary exhibit showcased the bold experimentation of local artists using recycled industrial materials.

vocab.meaning: giá trị tiền tệ (giá trị kinh tế)
vocab.example: While some people focus on the monetary value of the paintings, I’m more interested in their historical significance.
Only by seeing the work in person can you truly appreciate the subtle nuances in the textures and layering of the paint.

vocab.meaning: ấn tượng về mặt thị giác
vocab.example: The gallery featured several visually striking sculptures made entirely from glass and light fibers.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua rào cản ngôn ngữ
vocab.example: Art has this incredible ability to transcend language barriers and speak directly to our shared human experience.

vocab.meaning: không khí thanh bình, tĩnh lặng
vocab.example: I often visit art galleries on weekday mornings specifically for the serene atmosphere and lack of crowds.
